blended.narrative: Stevens Pass is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.3 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 4,073 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 4" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 31.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 39" over the past week. Current depth: 70".
